I like to take software apart, figure out how it works, and build it back better. If you have a weird or wild idea, let's build it.

Who I Am

Raunak Srivastava

7th Sem B.Tech CS Student at SRMU

Role Backend AI Intern @ FlyRank AI
Focus Backend, AI & Web Tech
Core Belief "Learning by Building"

Driven by Curiosity,
Defined by Code.

Hi, I'm Raunak Srivastava, a B.Tech Computer Science student currently in my 7th semester at Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University (SRMU), Lucknow.

I am focused on Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, and Full-Stack Development. I enjoy building practical applications, solving technical problems, and working with modern technologies to create solutions that deliver real value.

Currently, I am working as a Backend AI Engineer Intern at FlyRank AI, where I am gaining hands-on experience in developing AI-powered systems and backend technologies. Alongside my internship, I continuously improve my skills through projects, coding challenges, and exploring emerging technologies.

My primary interests include backend development, web technologies, and scalable software systems. I am also strengthening my knowledge of Data Structures & Algorithms and software development best practices.

My goal is to build innovative products, contribute to impactful technology solutions, and grow into a skilled Software Engineer capable of solving complex real-world problems through technology.

Areas of Interest

Full-Stack Development Artificial Intelligence Data Science Problem Solving UI/UX Design Software Engineering

# Internship log: Backend AI Engineer

const company = "FlyRank AI";

const role = "Backend AI Engineer Intern";

const duration = "June 2026 - Present";

Core Responsibilities & Impact

  • Developing robust and scalable AI-powered systems and backend microservices.
  • Optimizing API response structures and schema models for low-latency integrations.
  • Implementing data pipelines and workflows with focus on machine learning modules.
  • Collaborating with cross-functional engineering squads to build stable, production-ready modules.

Environment & Stack

Python FastAPI Node.js AI APIs Prisma SQL

# Education details: Engineering Academic Track

const institution = "Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University";

const location = "Lucknow, India";

const degree = "B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering";

const currentStatus = "7th Semester (Penultimate Year)";

Core Academic Subjects

  • Data Structures & Algorithms: Solid foundations in system optimization, time complexity, and data organization.
  • Software Engineering: Focus on clean architecture, SDLC methodologies, and robust testing patterns.
  • Data Science & AI: Foundations in machine learning models, statistical analysis, and neural networks.
  • Database Management: Schema normalization, relational constraints (MySQL, SQLite), and transaction safety.

Key Focus Areas

Algorithms Full-Stack Tech Problem Solving Data pipelines
